articles.original_title: Lakers Injury Report: Luka Doncic Ruled Out, Luke Kennard Questionable Vs. Warriors
articles.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers released their injury report for Saturday’s game against the Golden State Warriors and Luka Doncic (left hamstring strain) has been ruled out while Luke Kennard (trade pending) is questionable. articles.title: Luke Kennard Excited To Join Lakers, Hoping To Make Debut Saturday Vs. Warriors
articles.original_title: Luke Kennard Excited To Join Lakers, Hoping To Make Debut Saturday Vs. Warriors
articles.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers didn’t do much at the trade deadline, but they did make one deal, acquiring Luke Kennard from the Atlanta Hawks for Gabe Vincent and a second-round draft pick. Kennard will give the Lakers some much-needed outside shooting as he is a career 44.2% shooter from deep and is leading the league […]

articles.summary: One of the most consistent sights at a Los Angeles Lakers game is an A-list celebrity sitting courtside. articles.summary: Lakers star Luka Doncic will miss Saturday's game against the Warriors with a strained left hamstring, but sources told ESPN there is optimism that it is not a major injury.

articles.summary: The East-leading Detroit Pistons passed on taking a big swing at the trade deadline, opting to lean on their youth and chemistry with the playoffs a little over two months away.

articles.title: Sources: Conley, Wolves work on quick reunion
articles.original_title: Sources: Conley, Wolves work on quick reunion
articles.summary: Mike Conley Jr. plans to return to the Timberwolves, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania. Conley was traded by Minnesota this week, then traded again and waived, allowing for his return.

articles.title: Stevens' reminder to Tatum: Celts better with you
articles.original_title: Stevens' reminder to Tatum: Celts better with you
articles.summary: Brad Stevens has a message for Jayson Tatum if the injured Celtics star truly wonders whether he would still fit in on the team he led to the 2024 NBA championship: We're better with you.
